2604.12659.title: Do VLMs Truly "Read" Candlesticks? A Multi-Scale Benchmark for Visual Stock Price Forecasting
2604.12659.paper_summary: Vision-language models(VLMs) are increasingly applied to visual stock price forecasting, yet existing benchmarks inadequately evaluate their understanding of stock price in candlestick charts. First, prior studies fail to isolate VLMs' comprehension of visual inputs genuinely improves predictive performance and whether VLMs truly comprehend candlestick patterns. Further, most existing datasets and evaluation setups are designed around single-period or tabular inputs. However, human analysts strongly rely on multi-scale candlestick charts, where longer-term horizons capture trend direction and shorter-term horizons provide cues for inflection points, making it difficult to systematically assess VLMs' ability to integrate short-term and long-term visual market dynamics. To bridge this gap, we construct a multi-scale candlestick charts dataset and a standardized evaluation framework to assess VLMs' ability to utilize multi-scale visual market signals. Evaluation combines confusion-matrix-based diagnostics with information coefficient(IC) time series metrics and includes XGBoost as a feature-based temporal baseline. Using this dataset, we benchmark representative VLMs and analyze their ability to leverage multi-scale stock price data. Experimental results show that most VLMs perform well only under persistent uptrend or downtrend conditions, while exhibiting weak predictive capability in more common market scenarios. We also identify significant prediction biases and limited sensitivity to explicitly specified forecast horizons in prompts, indicating inherent limitations in precise temporal reasoning.
2604.12659.paper_summary_zh: 視覺語言模型（VLMs）越來越多地應用於視覺股票價格預測，然而現有的基準無法充分評估它們對蠟燭圖中股票價格的理解。<lb/>首先，先前的研究未能隔離VLMs對視覺輸入的理解是否真的改善了預測性能，以及VLMs是否真正理解蠟燭圖模式。<lb/>此外，大多數現有數據集和評估設置都是圍繞單一時期或表格輸入設計的。<lb/>然而，人類分析師強烈依賴多尺度蠟燭圖，其中較長期的視野捕捉趨勢方向，而較短期的視野則提供轉折點的線索，這使得系統性評估VLMs整合短期和長期視覺市場動態的能力變得困難。<lb/>為了填補這一空白，我們構建了一個多尺度蠟燭圖數據集和一個標準化的評估框架，以評估VLMs利用多尺度視覺市場信號的能力。<lb/>評估結合了基於混淆矩陣的診斷與信息係數（IC）時間序列指標，並包括XGBoost作為基於特徵的時間基準。<lb/>使用這個數據集，我們基準測試了代表性的VLMs並分析它們利用多尺度股票價格數據的能力。<lb/>實驗結果顯示，大多數VLMs僅在持續上漲或下跌的條件下表現良好，而在更常見的市場情況下則顯示出較弱的預測能力。<lb/>我們還識別出顯著的預測偏差和對提示中明確指定的預測範圍的有限敏感性，這表明在精確的時間推理上存在固有的限制。
2604.12659.author: Kaiqi Hu et.al.
2604.12659.authors: Kaiqi Hu, Linda Xiao, Shiyue Xu, Ziyi Tang, Mingwen Liu
